portal_introduction: This secure portal allows government officials to submit their asset and liability declarations in a simple, reliable, and efficient manner. Upholding transparency and accountability for a corruption-free Sri Lanka.
declaration_requirement_checker_desc: Please provide your details below to check if you are required to submit an asset and liability declaration.
description: This secure online portal is designed to make your declaration process simple, reliable, and accessible from anywhere, with step-by-step guidance, built-in validations, multilingual support, and user-friendly navigation for timely and accurate submission.
declaration_profile_registration_desc: Create your secure account to begin the asset declaration process quickly, safely, and efficiently
an_otp_sent_to_mobile_msg: An OTP has been sent to your mobile number for verification.
an_otp_sent_to_email_msg: An OTP has been sent to your email address for verification.
validation.mobile_pattern: Enter a valid 10-digit mobile number starting with 0 (e.g. 0771234567).
nic_already_registered_message: This NIC is already registered in the system. If you are not aware of this registration, please report it.
mobile_already_registered_message: This mobile number is already registered. If this wasn’t you, please report it. Otherwise, go to login and use ‘Forgot Password’ to reset it.
validation.email: Please enter a valid email address
